scripts.test:indexeddb: npm run test:indexeddb-persistence && npm run test:indexeddb-sync && npm run test:indexeddb-migration
scripts.test:persistence-matrix: npm run test:p0 && npm run test:runtime-history && npm run test:graph-persistence && npm run test:indexeddb
scripts.test:all: npm run test:persistence-matrix && npm run test:maintenance-journal && npm run test:trivial-input
scripts.check: node --check index.js && node --check sync/bme-db.js && node --check ui/hide-engine.js && node --check ui/panel.js && node --check ui/ui-status.js && node --check host/event-binding.js
